title: Implement an efficient two-sum index lookup
description: twosum.two_sum(nums, target) must return a tuple (i, j) with i < j of two distinct indices whose values sum to target, or None if no such pair exists (at most one valid answer). The function is currently a stub. Implement twosum/core.py. It must be EFFICIENT: an O(n) single pass using a hash map of seen values, NOT an O(n^2) double loop — a quadratic solution is cut off by the grader timeout on the large hidden input. Do not modify any test files.
